title: Assistant Store Manager - Spar India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Spar India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
